title: 9 PROVEN SaaS marketing strategies you need to try in 2026
author: Marketer Milk
description:
In this video, I go over nine SaaS marketing strategies big (and small) companies use to get users. This video specifically speaks more towards organic ways to acquire customers. Things like paid ads or influencer marketing are not apart of these nine strategies — although those are great when you have a lot of $$ and you’re trying to scale fast.

Hope you enjoy! Last 25% of the video is my favorite ;)

👉 Join +16,200 humans getting the latest marketing news, resources, and guides every week:
https://www.marketermilk.com/

🧠 My SaaS SEO course: https://www.contentmarketingcourse.com/


👇 Prefer to read? Check it out:
https://www.marketermilk.com/blog/b2b-saas-marketing


⏱️Timestamps⏱️
00:00 Intro
00:40 Strategy 1
06:47 Strategy 2
09:15 Strategy 3
13:00 Strategy 4
14:40 Strategy 5
17:05 Strategy 6
19:23 Strategy 7
20:34 Strategy 8 
22:20 Strategy 9
29:07 Outro


Disclaimer:
Everything I talk about on this channel is just from my own experience. Take everything with a grain of salt, do your own research, and know that these videos are for entertainment purposes only. Marketer Milk, or myself, are not responsible for anything you do after consuming this content.
